from source import knapsack
import pytest

def test_knapsack_exact_capacity():
    capacity = 3
    items = [(3, 10), (1, 5)]
    expected_value = 10
    assert knapsack(capacity, items) == expected_value, f"Expected knapsack({capacity}, {items}) to return {expected_value}, but got {knapsack(capacity, items)}"
